---
title: "Meshal alotaibi"
image: images/1.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact me
      href: mailto:Meshal.alotaibie1@gmail.com
---

Hi my name is Meshal Alotaibi Kuwait and i came to Albuquerque New Mexico in 2021 and a senior in the university of New Mexico and this is my last semester. I'm going for a degree in electrical engineering
